smtp_port.description: SMTP port (587 STARTTLS default, 465 for implicit TLS)

smtp_pass.description: SMTP login password (stored encrypted at rest)

smtp_tls.description: TLS mode: starttls (default), ssl (implicit), or none

channels.email.enabled.description: Enable email channel globally for this tenant

channels.sms.enabled.description: Enable SMS channel globally for this tenant

channels.whatsapp.enabled.description: Enable WhatsApp channel globally for this tenant

channels.in_app.enabled.description: Enable in-app feed channel globally for this tenant

channels.push.enabled.description: Enable push notification channel globally for this tenant (stub)

sms.provider.description: SMS provider: noop (log-only), aws (SNS), or twilio

email.throttle.per_user_per_minute.description: Max email notifications per user per minute

email.throttle.per_tenant_per_minute.description: Max email notifications per tenant per minute

sms.throttle.per_user_per_minute.description: Max SMS notifications per user per minute

sms.throttle.per_tenant_per_minute.description: Max SMS notifications per tenant per minute

templates.expiry_alert.channels.description: JSON array of channels for expiry_alert e.g. ["email","in_app"]

templates.expiry_alert.locales.description: JSON array of supported locales for expiry_alert e.g. ["en","dz"]

templates.workflow_assigned.channels.description: JSON array of channels for workflow_assigned

templates.workflow_assigned.locales.description: JSON array of supported locales for workflow_assigned

templates.aml_hit.channels.description: JSON array of channels for aml_hit

templates.aml_hit.locales.description: JSON array of supported locales for aml_hit

templates.user_invite.channels.description: JSON array of channels for user_invite

templates.user_invite.locales.description: JSON array of supported locales for user_invite

templates.dsar_completed.channels.description: JSON array of channels for dsar_completed

templates.dsar_completed.locales.description: JSON array of supported locales for dsar_completed

routing.expiry_alert.description: JSON array of role names that receive expiry_alert

routing.workflow_assigned.description: JSON array of role names that receive workflow_assigned

routing.aml_hit.description: JSON array of role names that receive aml_hit

routing.user_invite.description: JSON array of role names for user_invite (empty = direct address only)

routing.dsar_completed.description: JSON array of role names for dsar_completed (empty = direct address only)
